chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S- 543 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on MA 4614/2-023 2.For orders on office objections 3.For orders on MA 4615/2023 4.For hearing of Bail Application 16-08-2023 Mr. Aneet Kumar Roopejo, Advocate along with applicants. ****** 1. Urgency is granted. 2-4. Applicants, namely, Ghulam Sarwar (Sarwar, shown in FIR), Ali Gul and Roshan seek protective bail in Crime No.33 of 2021, registered at Police Station, Jaggan alias Humayoun-Shikarpur, for offence under Sections 365-B & 363 PPC. It is, inter-alia, contended by learned counsel that prior to this, applicants were admitted to protective bail by this Court in the above crime for a period of seven days in the sum of Rs.10,000/-each vide order dated 03.08.2023, passed in Crl. B.A.No.S-521 of 2023 and the applicants had furnished required surety before the Additional Registrar of this Court, but they could not approach the Sessions Court at Shikarpur, as they could not arrange the surety to be submitted in pre-arrest bail application before the Sessions Court concerned. Hence, he requests that applicants may be admitted to protective bail on the same surety, already furnished by them in the above bail application. Without touching the merits of the case, protective bail for period of Three days is granted to the applicants, on the same surety, furnished by them earlier in Crl.B.A.No.S-521 of 2023, if any. Meanwhile, operation of NBWs, if any, issued by the trial Court shall remain suspended for the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to

Meanwhile, operation of NBWs, if any, issued by the trial Court shall remain suspended for the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of aforesaid period or the date when the applicants surrender before the trial Court, whichever occurs earlier. It is made clear that if the applicants failed to surrender before the trial Court in three days, their bail bonds shall stand automatically forfeited. The bail application along with listed applications is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Ahmad
